## 2.2.0 — 2026-07-01

### Added
- **Inline ignore comments** — `// signal-lens-ignore-next-line`, `// signal-lens-disable`, `// signal-lens-enable`
- **PR auto-labeling** — `signal-lens:*` labels based on findings (`signal-lens label`, `review --apply-labels`)
- **Secret entropy scanner** — Shannon entropy detection of hardcoded secrets
- **Dependency vulnerability check** — OSV database checks for new dependencies
- **Slack/Discord notifications** — webhook delivery on blocker/high findings
- **Review quality trends** — `signal-lens trends` with finding counts, false-positive rate, AI vs static ratio

### Fixed
- All static analyzers now populate `evidence.line` — inline comments and line-level ignore suppression work correctly
- Fixture snapshots regenerated with stable IDs and current version

### Changed
- AI providers run all perspectives concurrently via `Promise.all` (3x speedup)
- Action includes `apply-labels` and `notify-webhook` inputs
